/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui.a CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/backends/imgui_impl_dx9.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/backends/imgui_impl_win32.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui.a
